features: Bronchostop Cough Syrup Is Used for Relieving all Cough Types - Cold and flu and other ailments can bring with it all manner of nasty cough symptoms. Tickly, dry or chesty coughs are all common

Relief For Cough Symptoms - A formula with natural thyme herb extract and marshmallow root extract that is used to relieve cough symptoms. Bronchostop Cough Syrup is used to soothe your throat & cough

Natural Ingredients That are used for Cough Relief- This cough syrup relies on simple, natural ingredients such as thyme herb extract & marshmallow root extract. Together, these are used to tackle the mucus build up and soothe irritation
THR Registered Non-Drowsy Cough Medicine is used to relieve cough symptoms without reducing alertness

How To Take Bronchostop Cough Syrup - Use the measuring cup provided to measure out a 15ml dose of Bronchostop syrup. Take one 15ml dose every 4 hours, 4 times a day. Maximum of 6 servings per day. Suitable for Adults and Children over 12
Dual Action - Relieves dry and chesty coughs
description: Product Description Discover Bronchostop, a registered traditional herbal remedy that is used to treat all forms of Cough. Bronchostop fights all 5 forms of cough: Chesty, Mucus, Dry, Tickly and Catarrh. Bronchostop's registered traditional herbal remedy formula consists of natural thyme herb extract and marshmallow root extract and is used to relieve all types of cough. - Cough Syrup that is used to fight off all 5 forms of cough - Traditional Herbal Remedy made from natural thyme herb and marshmallow root extract - Alcohol free formula that is also non-drowsy - Syrup that can be taken by itself or diluted in water or warm tea In addition to being used as a way to soothe your cough, regardless of which kind you have; this cough syrup is also completely alcohol free and non-drowsy. For a formula that is used to fight coughs in a way that won't get in the way of your day to day routine. Bronchostop Adult Cough Syrup and Cough Pastilles are used to fight off dry or chesty coughs. Bronchostop also offers a range of Adult and Children's products. Among the Adult Cough Syrup and Cough Pastilles, Bronchostop also offers Bronchostop Junior Children's Cough Syrup that provides support against coughs for children aged 3 to 11. Buttercup Bronchostop Cough Syrup. A traditional herbal medicinal product for use in the relief of coughs, such as chesty coughs and dry, tickly, irritating coughs and catarrh, exclusively based upon long-standing use as a traditional remedy. Always read the leaflet. Ingredients Each 15ml of Oral Syrup contains the active ingredients: 120 mg of Extract (as Dry Extract) from Thyme Herb (Thymus Vulgaris L. and Thymus Zygis L., Herb) (DER 7-13:1) Extraction Solvent: Water, 830 mg of Extract (as Liquid Extract) from Marshmallow Root (Althaea Officinalis L.) (DER 12-14:1). Also contains: Methyl Parahydroxybenzoate and Propyl Parahydroxybenzoate. See leaflet for further information Directions Adults and children over 12 years: Take 15 ml of syrup every 4 hours, 4 times a day. Do not exceed 4 doses (60 ml) per day. Safety Warning Do not use if you are allergic to thyme, marshmallow, or any of the other ingredients. Consult a doctor before use if you are pregnant, breastfeeding, or taking any other medication. Not suitable for children under 12 years. If symptoms persist or worsen, seek medical advice. Keep out of reach of children. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Manufacturer Contact Information Omega Pharma Ltd., 32 Vauxhall Bridge Road, London, SW1V 2SA, United Kingdom. See more
